{{Quote|Never borrow money from someone powerful enough to make you pay. Let your workers know you trust them...then ''watch'' them.|Passages from Darth Vectivus' holocron|<ref name="Inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>}}
The '''Holocron of Darth Vectivus''', also known as the '''Vectivus Holocron''', was a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] created by [[Darth Vectivus]], whom the [[One Sith|New Sith Order]] deemed a fake and an impostor.<ref name="Inferno" /> It apparently contained nothing of any significant value. All it is known to have possessed was Vectivus's business information and how to project [[Force phantom]]s. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], having no use for the information within, gave the ersatz [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] to [[Alema Rar]]. She was to give it to [[Darth Caedus]] as a symbolic gift showing his "worth" to their Order—which is to say, they found him worthless and expendable. The holocron never arrived in the possession of Darth Caedus and it is presumed to have perished with Alema Rar when [[Lumiya]]'s [[The Home|asteroid habitat]] was destroyed by [[Dician]]. Thus, Darth Caedus and the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] remained oblivious to the existence of the New Sith Order until its voluntary reemergence around [[127 ABY]] in the [[Sith–Imperial War]].
